20260331000100_cycle12_rls_policy_alignm.notes: Replaces legacy strict tenant RLS predicates with tenant_access_allowed() for bootstrap/admin-safe setup while preserving tenant isolation after session pinning.

rollback.strategy: Recreate the legacy get_current_tenant_id()-based policies for the affected tables or restore the previous stable snapshot if policy drift is detected after deploy.
steps: Pause deploy and traffic cutover.
Reapply the prior strict tenant RLS predicates for the affected tables.
Validate release smoke tests and tenant isolation checks in staging.
Restore the last stable snapshot if policy rollback does not converge cleanly.

20260402000100_cycle12_ci_schema_alignme.notes: Backfills the index/default/FK drift that forced CI to reconcile the schema with db push after migrate deploy.

rollback.strategy: Restore the previous application version and reintroduce the prior legacy indexes/defaults only if the new alignment migration causes schema validation regressions.
steps: Pause deploy and traffic cutover.
Validate the migration-state report and schema drift report.
Restore the previous stable snapshot or reapply the former index/default definitions if alignment introduces regressions.
Replay smoke tests and tenant isolation checks before reopening traffic.

20260407000300_phase1_lgpd_user_preferen.notes: Aligns user preference storage with the LGPD consent center so privacy UI, dashboard warnings and audit trails share the same persisted state. Rollback validated in staging during governance rehearsal before enabling rollbackTested=true.

rollback.strategy: Keep the consent center read-only and remove the added preference fields only if the new LGPD write path regresses notifications or privacy exports.
steps: Pause the rollout and validate the migration state.
Confirm backup freshness and the current preference payload shape.
Drop the LGPD preference columns and enums or restore the previous stable snapshot if needed.
Replay privacy, notification and dashboard smoke tests before reopening traffic.

20260408000100_phase1_user_preference_lo.notes: Adds locale persistence on user preferences so language selection remains tenant-scoped and consistent across sessions.

rollback.strategy: Remove the locale column or restore the previous snapshot if locale persistence causes regression in profile reads or writes.
steps: Pause deployment and confirm migration state report.
Validate backup freshness and current user preference payloads.
Drop the locale column or restore the previous stable snapshot if required.
Replay profile and settings smoke tests before reopening traffic.

20260410000100_phase1_workflow_revision_.notes: Enforces tenant-level row security for workflow_revisions so revision history follows the canonical isolation model.

rollback.strategy: Drop the workflow_revisions tenant policy and rollback snapshot only if RLS enforcement blocks legitimate revision reads.
steps: Pause deployment and confirm migration state and tenant access checks.
Validate backup freshness and impacted workflow revision endpoints.
Drop policy changes or restore the previous stable snapshot if reads regress.
Replay tenant isolation and workflow revision smoke tests before reopening traffic.
